<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep the change focused and use a Conventional Commit
title, e.g. "fix(inbound): tolerate string message payloads".
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (config or behavior)
- [ ] Docs / tooling / CI only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added/updated tests for the change)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` (if user-facing)
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `openclaw.plugin.json` schema) if config or behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets in the diff, tests, or fixtures

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, manual testing done. -->
